'''modharaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabined|cabined]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabined|cabined]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| modharaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:modharithi|modharithi]] || [[word:modhariji|modhariji]] || [[word:modharishi|modharishi]] || [[word:modhariki|modhariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:modharuthuthu|modharuthuthu]] || [[word:modharujuju|modharujuju]] || [[word:modharushushu|modharushushu]] || [[word:modharukuku|modharukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:modharuthu|modharuthu]] || [[word:modharuju|modharuju]] || [[word:modharushu|modharushu]] || [[word:modharuku|modharuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:modharufthuf|modharufthuf]] || [[word:modharufjuf|modharufjuf]] || [[word:modharufshuf|modharufshuf]] || [[word:modharufkuf|modharufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:modharethe|modharethe]] || [[word:modhareje|modhareje]] || [[word:modhareshe|modhareshe]] || [[word:modhareke|modhareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:modharothotho|modharothotho]] || [[word:modharojojo|modharojojo]] || [[word:modharoshosho|modharoshosho]] || [[word:modharokoko|modharokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:modharotho|modharotho]] || [[word:modharojo|modharojo]] || [[word:modharosho|modharosho]] || [[word:modharoko|modharoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:modharofthof|modharofthof]] || [[word:modharofjof|modharofjof]] || [[word:modharofshof|modharofshof]] || [[word:modharofkof|modharofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:modharïfthïf|modharïfthïf]] || [[word:modharïfjïf|modharïfjïf]] || [[word:modharïfshïf|modharïfshïf]] || [[word:modharïfkïf|modharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:modharïfthïfthïf|modharïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:modharïfjïfjïf|modharïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:modharïfshïfshïf|modharïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:modharïfkïfkïf|modharïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:modharïfthïf|modharïfthïf]] || [[word:modharïfjïf|modharïfjïf]] || [[word:modharïfshïf|modharïfshïf]] || [[word:modharïfkïf|modharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:modharïfthïf|modharïfthïf]] || [[word:modharïfjïf|modharïfjïf]] || [[word:modharïfshïf|modharïfshïf]] || [[word:modharïfkïf|modharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:modharæthæ|modharæthæ]] || [[word:modharæjæ|modharæjæ]] || [[word:modharæshæ|modharæshæ]] || [[word:modharækæ|modharækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:modharathatha|modharathatha]] || [[word:modharajaja|modharajaja]] || [[word:modharashasha|modharashasha]] || [[word:modharakaka|modharakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:modharatha|modharatha]] || [[word:modharaja|modharaja]] || [[word:modharasha|modharasha]] || [[word:modharaka|modharaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:modharafthaf|modharafthaf]] || [[word:modharafjaf|modharafjaf]] || [[word:modharafshaf|modharafshaf]] || [[word:modharafkaf|modharafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:modharasha|modharasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:modharshësha|modharshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modharosha|modharosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modharmusha|modharmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:modharyasha|modharyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodharnkshësha|gomodharnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodharnkrosha|gomodharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodharnkmusha|gomodharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodharnkyasha|gomodharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:modhadharasha|modhadharasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhadharshësha|modhadharshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhadharosha|modhadharosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhadharmusha|modhadharmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhadharyasha|modhadharyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhadharnkshësha|gomodhadharnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhadharnkrosha|gomodhadharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhadharnkmusha|gomodhadharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhadharnkyasha|gomodhadharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:medhærasha|medhærasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:medhærshësha|medhærshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:medhærosha|medhærosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:medhærmusha|medhærmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:medhæryasha|medhæryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomedhærnkshësha|gomedhærnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomedhærnkrosha|gomedhærnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomedhærnkmusha|gomedhærnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomedhærnkyasha|gomedhærnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:modhfarasha|modhfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhfarshësha|modhfarshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhfarosha|modhfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhfarmusha|modhfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhfaryasha|modhfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhfarnkshësha|gomodhfarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhfarnkrosha|gomodhfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhfarnkmusha|gomodhfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhfarnkyasha|gomodhfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
